summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Deposit/Withdrawal Request System. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Full flow tested: user creates request -> admin approves/rejects -> balance updates.

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on email and password inputs - using placeholder selectors instead
Console warning about chart dimensions (-1, -1) - cosmetic issue, charts still render

passed_tests: GET /api/brokers - returns list of active brokers (Freedom Finance)
GET /api/company-bank-info - returns company bank details
POST /api/deposit-requests - user can create deposit request
GET /api/deposit-requests - user can view their deposit requests
GET /api/admin/deposit-requests - admin can view all deposit requests
GET /api/admin/deposit-requests?status=pending - admin can filter pending deposits
PUT /api/admin/deposit-requests/{id} approve - balance increases correctly
PUT /api/admin/deposit-requests/{id} reject - balance unchanged
POST /api/withdrawal-requests - user can create withdrawal with broker selection
POST /api/withdrawal-requests - insufficient balance check works
GET /api/withdrawal-requests - user can view their withdrawal requests
GET /api/admin/withdrawal-requests - admin can view all withdrawal requests
PUT /api/admin/withdrawal-requests/{id} approve - balance decreases correctly
Existing $5000 pending deposit request verified
WalletPage UI - balance cards display correctly
WalletPage UI - Deposit button opens dialog with amount input and bank details
WalletPage UI - Withdrawal button opens dialog with broker dropdown
WalletPage UI - Deposits/Withdrawals history tabs visible
AdminRequests UI - page loads with stats cards
AdminRequests UI - Deposits tab shows pending requests with approve/reject buttons
AdminRequests UI - Withdrawals tab shows pending requests with broker info
AdminRequests UI - Approval dialog shows request details and confirmation
AdminRequests UI - Filter buttons (Pending/Approved/Rejected/All) work
critical_code_review_comments: Login page inputs should have data-testid attributes for better testability
Chart component has dimension warning in console - minor cosmetic issue
seed_data_creation: Created test users for deposit/withdrawal testing. Existing $5000 pending deposit request was already in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deposit/Withdrawal system fully functional. Backend endpoints: POST/GET /api/deposit-requests, POST/GET /api/withdrawal-requests, GET/PUT /api/admin/deposit-requests, GET/PUT /api/admin/withdrawal-requests, GET /api/brokers. Frontend pages: /wallet (WalletPage) and /admin/withdrawals (AdminRequests). 1 broker available: Freedom Finance. Balance updates correctly on approval.

components: Withdrawal button with dialog and broker selection
Stats cards (pending deposits/withdrawals count and amounts)

steps: User creates deposit request via POST /api/deposit-requests
Admin views pending requests via GET /api/admin/deposit-requests
User creates withdrawal request via POST /api/withdrawal-requests
Admin views pending requests via GET /api/admin/withdrawal-requests
